name: Iria Circle Pool Deck Plan - 10x12 Pool Deck for 15' Round Pools | DIY PDF Plans
open_features: Designed specifically for 15' diameter round above-ground pools
Efficient 10x12 deck footprint - ideal for compact yards and tight spaces
Optimized walking clearance for safe and comfortable pool entry
Built-in railing layout for enhanced safety and clean aesthetics
Simple, modern design - perfect for quick builds & lower material costs
Easy-to-follow DIY PDF plans with complete material cut list & step-by-step building guide
Pool Fit: 15' diameter round above-ground pools (pool not included)
description_summary:
The Iria Circle Pool Deck Plan transforms your 15-foot above-ground pool into a clean, functional, and space-efficient backyard upgrade. Featuring a compact 10x12 platform layout, this design delivers safe access, smooth movement, and comfortable poolside usability - perfect for small yards, minimalist outdoor spaces, and budget-friendly DIY builds. Iria blends simplicity, safety, and modern outdoor style into one smart pool deck solution. Key Features
